dashboard.label: Tenable Vulnerability Management Aging Scans - Main View

search.query: | inputlookup tenable_vm_scans_merged.csv | rename id AS ID name AS Name owner AS Owner folder_id AS Folder_ID status AS Status type AS Type total_targets AS TotalTargets enabled AS Enabled description AS Description creation_date AS created_raw last_modification_date AS updated_raw | eval created_epoch=case( match(created_raw,"^\d{13}$"), round(tonumber(created_raw)/1000), match(created_raw,"^\d{10}$"), tonumber(created_raw), match(created_raw,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}T"), strptime(created_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"), match(created_raw,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} "), strptime(created_raw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), true(), null() ) | eval updated_epoch=case( match(updated_raw,"^\d{13}$"), round(tonumber(updated_raw)/1000), match(updated_raw,"^\d{10}$"), tonumber(updated_raw), match(updated_raw,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}T"), strptime(updated_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"), match(updated_raw,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} "), strptime(updated_raw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), true(), null() ) | where isnotnull(created_epoch) OR isnotnull(updated_epoch) | eval "Created Date"=if(isnull(created_epoch),"",strftime(created_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")) | eval Updated=if(isnull(updated_epoch),"",strftime(updated_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")) | eval age_seconds=case( isnotnull(created_epoch) AND isnotnull(updated_epoch) AND (now()-created_epoch)>=(now()-updated_epoch), now()-created_epoch, isnotnull(created_epoch) AND isnotnull(updated_epoch), now()-updated_epoch, isnotnull(created_epoch), now()-created_epoch, isnotnull(updated_epoch), now()-updated_epoch ) | eval age_days=round(age_seconds/86400,2) | eval Scan_age=case( age_days>2555,"🚨 Greater than 7 years old", age_days>2190,"🔥 Greater than 6 years old", age_days>1825,"⛔ Greater than 5 years old", age_days>1460,"⚠️ Greater than 4 years old", age_days>1095,"🟠 Greater than 3 years old", age_days>730,"🟡 Greater than 2 years old", age_days>365,"🔵 Greater than 1 year old", age_days>180,"🧊 Less than 1 year old but greater than 180 days", age_days>90,"🌊 Less than 180 days but greater than 90 days", age_days>60,"🌿 Less than 90 days but greater than 60 days", age_days>30,"🍃 Less than 60 days but greater than 30 days", age_days>15,"🌱 Less than 30 days but greater than 15 days", age_days>7,"🕒 Less than 15 days but greater than 7 days", age_days>1,"⏱️ Less than 7 days but greater than 1 day", true(),"🆕 Within last 24 hours" ) | eval age_sort=case( match(Scan_age,"Greater than 7 years"),15, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 6 years"),14, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 5 years"),13, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 4 years"),12, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 3 years"),11, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 2 years"),10, match(Scan_age,"Greater than 1 year"),9, match(Scan_age,"greater than 180 days"),8, match(Scan_age,"greater than 90 days"),7, match(Scan_age,"greater than 60 days"),6, match(Scan_age,"greater than 30 days"),5, match(Scan_age,"greater than 15 days"),4, match(Scan_age,"greater than 7 days"),3, match(Scan_age,"greater than 1 day"),2, match(Scan_age,"Within last 24 hours"),1, 1=1,0 ) | eval EnabledBadge=if(Enabled="true" OR Enabled=1,"✅ Enabled","⏸️ Disabled") | eval Owner=if(isnull(Owner) OR trim(Owner)="","Unknown user",Owner) | eval "Owner Status"=case(Owner="Unknown user","⚠️ Missing", true(),"✅ Present") | eval Folder_ID=if(isnull(Folder_ID) OR trim(Folder_ID)="","⚠️ Missing",Folder_ID) | eval "Folder Status"=case(Folder_ID="⚠️ Missing","⚠️ Missing", true(),"✅ Present") | eval Status=if(isnull(Status) OR trim(Status)="","Unknown",Status) | eval Type=if(isnull(Type) OR trim(Type)="","Unknown",Type) | eval Description=coalesce(Description,"") | eval TotalTargets=coalesce(TotalTargets,0) | eval _time=coalesce(updated_epoch,created_epoch) | fields ID Name Owner Folder_ID Status Type Enabled EnabledBadge Description "Created Date" Updated created_epoch updated_epoch age_days Scan_age age_sort "Owner Status" "Folder Status" TotalTargets _time
| stats count AS Total_Number_of_Scans

html.div:
🆕 Within last 24 hours · ⏱️ Less than 7 days but greater than 1 day · 🕒 Less than 15 days but greater than 7 days · 🌱 Less than 30 days but greater than 15 days · 🍃 Less than 60 days but greater than 30 days · 🌿 Less than 90 days but greater than 60 days · 🌊 Less than 180 days but greater than 90 days · 🧊 Less than 1 year old but greater than 180 days · 🔵 Greater than 1 year old · 🟡 Greater than 2 years old · 🟠 Greater than 3 years old · ⚠️ Greater than 4 years old · ⛔ Greater than 5 years old · 🔥 Greater than 6 years old · 🚨 Greater than 7 years old
✅ Enabled · ⏸️ Disabled
Unknown user · ⚠️ Missing Folder ID

search.query: | stats count by Scan_age age_sort | sort - age_sort | fields Scan_age count
| where Enabled="true" OR Enabled=1 | stats count AS Total_Enabled_Scans
| where Enabled="false" OR Enabled=0 | stats count AS Total_Disabled_Scans

panel.title: 🎯 Total Number of Targets Across All Scans

search.query: | stats sum(TotalTargets) as Total_Number_of_Targets
| where isnull(Description) OR trim(Description)="" | stats count AS Scans_Without_Description
| stats avg(age_days) AS avg_age_days | eval avg_age_days=round(avg_age_days,2) | rename avg_age_days AS "Average Scan Age (Days)"
| stats median(age_days) AS median_age_days | eval median_age_days=round(median_age_days,2) | rename median_age_days AS "Median Scan Age (Days)"
| stats avg(TotalTargets) AS avg_targets | eval avg_targets=round(avg_targets,2) | rename avg_targets AS "Average Targets per Scan"

panel.title: Largest Target Count on a Single Scan

search.query: | stats max(TotalTargets) AS largest_target_count | rename largest_target_count AS "Largest Target Count on a Single Scan"

panel.title: Number of Scans Created in Last 30 Days

search.query: | where isnotnull(created_epoch) AND created_epoch>=relative_time(now(), "-30d@d") | stats count AS "Number of Scans Created in Last 30 Days"

panel.title: Number of Scans Updated in Last 30 Days

search.query: | where isnotnull(updated_epoch) AND updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(), "-30d@d") | stats count AS "Number of Scans Updated in Last 30 Days"

panel.title: Number of Scans Never Updated Since Creation

search.query: | where isnotnull(created_epoch) AND isnotnull(updated_epoch) AND round(created_epoch,0)=round(updated_epoch,0) | stats count AS "Number of Scans Never Updated Since Creation"

panel.title: Total Targets and Percentage per Scan

search.query: | stats max(TotalTargets) as total_targets by Name ID Owner | eventstats sum(total_targets) as grand_total | eval percent_total = round((total_targets / grand_total) * 100, 2) | eval "% of Total" = percent_total . "%" | rename total_targets as "Total Targets" | fields Name ID Owner "Total Targets" "% of Total" | sort - "Total Targets"
| stats count AS Total_Scans by Owner | sort - Total_Scans + Owner | head 20
| where Owner="Unknown user" | table "Created Date" Name Owner Status Scan_age TotalTargets ID | sort + Name
| where Owner="Unknown user" | stats count AS Scans_Missing_Owner
| where 'Folder Status'="⚠️ Missing" | stats count AS Scans_Missing_Folder_ID

panel.title: Scans Created: Day over Day, Week over Week, Month over Month, Quarter over Quarter, Year over Year

search.query: | stats count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@d"))) as dod_current count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1d@d") AND created_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@d"))) as dod_previous count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@w"))) as wow_current count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1w@w") AND created_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@w"))) as wow_previous count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@mon"))) as mom_current count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1mon@mon") AND created_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@mon"))) as mom_previous count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@q"))) as qoq_current count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1q@q") AND created_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@q"))) as qoq_previous count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@y"))) as yoy_current count(eval(created_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1y@y") AND created_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@y"))) as yoy_previous | eval Period="Day over Day", Current=dod_current, Previous=dod_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" | appendpipe [ eval Period="Week over Week", Current=wow_current, Previous=wow_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Month over Month", Current=mom_current, Previous=mom_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Quarter over Quarter", Current=qoq_current, Previous=qoq_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Year over Year", Current=yoy_current, Previous=yoy_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ]

panel.title: Scans Updated: Day over Day, Week over Week, Month over Month, Quarter over Quarter, Year over Year

search.query: | stats count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@d"))) as dod_current count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1d@d") AND updated_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@d"))) as dod_previous count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@w"))) as wow_current count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1w@w") AND updated_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@w"))) as wow_previous count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@mon"))) as mom_current count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1mon@mon") AND updated_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@mon"))) as mom_previous count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@q"))) as qoq_current count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1q@q") AND updated_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@q"))) as qoq_previous count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"@y"))) as yoy_current count(eval(updated_epoch>=relative_time(now(),"-1y@y") AND updated_epoch<relative_time(now(),"@y"))) as yoy_previous | eval Period="Day over Day", Current=dod_current, Previous=dod_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" | appendpipe [ eval Period="Week over Week", Current=wow_current, Previous=wow_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Month over Month", Current=mom_current, Previous=mom_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Quarter over Quarter", Current=qoq_current, Previous=qoq_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ] | appendpipe [ eval Period="Year over Year", Current=yoy_current, Previous=yoy_previous | eval Delta=Current-Previous | eval "Percent Change"=if(Previous=0,"N/A", round(((Current-Previous)/Previous)*100,2)."%") | table Period Current Previous Delta "Percent Change" ]
| sort + created_epoch | head 5 | table "Created Date" Name Owner Status Scan_age TotalTargets
| sort - created_epoch | head 5 | table "Created Date" Name Owner Status Scan_age TotalTargets

| eval age_whole_days = floor(age_days) | eval age_years = floor(age_whole_days/365) | eval age_months = floor((age_whole_days % 365)/30) | eval age_rem_days= age_whole_days - (age_years*365) - (age_months*30) | eval Age = case( age_years>0 AND age_months>0 AND age_rem_days>0, age_years."y ".age_months."m ".age_rem_days."d", age_years>0 AND age_months>0, age_years."y ".age_months."m", age_years>0, age_years."y", age_months>0 AND age_rem_days>0, age_months."m ".age_rem_days."d", age_months>0, age_months."m", true(), age_rem_days."d" ) | table "Created Date" Updated Age Scan_age Name Owner Status Type Description EnabledBadge TotalTargets Folder_ID ID | rename Updated AS "Last Updated" | rename EnabledBadge AS "Enabled Badge" | rename TotalTargets AS "Total Targets" | rename Folder_ID AS "Folder ID"
